mapper.select: SELECT vi.*, u.university_name, m1.major_name AS major_name_1, m2.major_name AS major_name_2, m3.major_name AS major_name_3, m4.major_name AS major_name_4, m5.major_name AS major_name_5, m6.major_name AS major_name_6 FROM cers_volunteer_item vi LEFT JOIN cers_university u ON vi.university_id = u.university_id LEFT JOIN cers_major m1 ON vi.major_id_1 = m1.major_id LEFT JOIN cers_major m2 ON vi.major_id_2 = m2.major_id LEFT JOIN cers_major m3 ON vi.major_id_3 = m3.major_id LEFT JOIN cers_major m4 ON vi.major_id_4 = m4.major_id LEFT JOIN cers_major m5 ON vi.major_id_5 = m5.major_id LEFT JOIN cers_major m6 ON vi.major_id_6 = m6.major_id WHERE vi.form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY vi.sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cers_volunteer_item (form_id, sort_order, university_id, major_id_1, major_id_2, major_id_3, major_id_4, major_id_5, major_id_6, is_adjustment, check_status, check_messages) VALUES (#{formId}, #{sortOrder}, #{universityId}, #{majorId1}, #{majorId2}, #{majorId3}, #{majorId4}, #{majorId5}, #{majorId6}, #{isAdjustment}, #{checkStatus}, #{checkMessages})
mapper.update: UPDATE cers_volunteer_item SET check_status = #{checkStatus}, check_messages = #{checkMessages} WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM cers_volunteer_item WHERE form_id = #{formId}
